name: Happiness
overview: In a post-COVID world, a mysterious drug called “Next” sparks a terrifying outbreak of madness. As violent deaths rise, detective Prap reveals a chilling link between the chaos and the drug—uncovering a conspiracy far darker than expected.

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TRAILER] #HAPPINESSTH | เริ่ม 30 พฤษภาคม นี้ ทาง TrueID
